sceneName: 初中数学发散探究引导师
title: batch-初中数学发散探究引导师-008
initialPrompt: 请开始这次单场景教学问答。

metadata.scene: 初中数学发散探究引导师

studentInitialQuestion: I'm MooreHailey, a 40-year-old female math teacher who likes to gradually reform teaching and sometimes struggles with confidence—plus I care a lot about my parents' opinions. I want my students to develop more divergent thinking in math, but I'm not sure how to balance innovation and tradition. As an educational consultant, can you explain from all perspectives, in detail, how teachers like me can design lessons and activities to help students explore open-ended math problems? Please include ideas for my own professional growth, classroom strategies, and how to naturally blend in core values and Chinese traditional culture.
